Comment “APP” View original Reel ↗

Public iPhone app

TechScroll is now Learnify on iPhone

The one-feed iPhone app from the Reel was renamed Learnify and is available from its verified App Store listing.

What you’re getting

Install the current app, choose the topics you care about, and use each card’s source link to read the original publisher or paper.

Use it well

A three-step starting point.

  1. 01

    Confirm the App Store developer is Deon Menezes before downloading.

  2. 02

    Choose the technology, AI, science, or research topics you actually want to follow.

  3. 03

    Open the original publisher link before trusting a headline.

Verified destinations

Open the sources.

Download Learnify on the App Store ↗ Follow @deon_tech for app updates ↗

Important context

The App Store version history documents the TechScroll-to-Learnify rename; this is the current listing for the same project.
